payload.answer: I can’t tell who “he” refers to or what “the other one” is. Please clarify the person and the item/preference before I can suggest a memory update.
repair_options: Specify what “the other one” refers to.
Provide the full preference as a standalone statement, e.g., “[Person] prefers [item/option].”
If this is meant to replace an earlier preference, state the earlier preference and the new preference explicitly.
If this is an additional preference rather than a replacement, say that it should be kept separately.
